title: Odisha Geography in 60 Seconds
description:
Odisha is one of India’s most underrated regions, and its geography hides some incredible secrets. In this video, we explore Odisha in a simple and visual way  from mineral-rich plateaus and the Eastern Ghats to fertile central lands and the coastal Utkal plains shaped by powerful rivers.

You’ll learn about the Mahanadi and the massive Hirakud Dam, the river systems that build Odisha’s coastline, and Chilika Lake, Asia’s largest lagoon and a seasonal home for migratory birds. Odisha’s geography explains why it’s rich in minerals, agriculture, biodiversity, and water resources.

Watch till the end and tell us which district of Odisha you’re watching from.

#Odisha #GeographyOfOdisha #IndianGeography #EasternGhats #Mahanadi #ChilikaLake #IndiaExplained #EducationalVideo #IndianStates #TheInformedCitizen
